summary: The implementation addresses most requirements related to admin authentication and logging. However, critical backend logic for isCallerAdmin and adminPrincipals HashMap initialization/verification is not visible in the truncated diff, making it impossible to verify REQ-102, REQ-103, and most of REQ-104. Frontend requirements (REQ-105, REQ-106) appear implemented with proper logging and boolean handling.

missing_requirements.requirement: Debug and fix the backend isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner with principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-547l3-aae'
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the isCallerAdmin method implementation. Cannot verify if the method exists, if it authenticates the specified principal, or if it returns true for the owner.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify the admin principals HashMap initialization in backend/main.mo correctly stores the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-547l3-aae' during actor initialization
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff shows AccessControl integration but is truncated before showing adminPrincipals HashMap initialization or the hardcoded owner principal. Cannot verify HashMap storage or retrieval logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method to output the caller's principal in text format using Principal.toText(), the HashMap lookup result, and whether the principal exists in the admin set
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not include the isCallerAdmin method or any logging statements using Principal.toText(). Cannot verify if diagnostic logging was added.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module and migration run integration in backend/main.mo
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention creating a migration system or migration.mo file. The diff shows a new migration.mo file and integration '(with migration = Migration.run)' in main.mo, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: AccessControl module integration replacing direct adminPrincipals HashMap
hallucinated_features.reason: Constraint specified 'Use the existing adminPrincipals HashMap for admin storage' and 'Maintain single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo'. The diff shows MixinAuthorization and AccessControl module integration, which appears to be a new access control system rather than fixing the existing HashMap-based admin check.
